notableEvents.label: Maikel Garcia GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Maikel Garcia grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Kyle Isbel out at 2nd. Maikel Garcia out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas strikes out swinging, catcher Pedro Pagés to first baseman Alec Burleson.
